notes: Measured from /tmp/llama-cpp-gemma4-12b-turbo3.log because the local urllib client remained blocked after the server logged HTTP 200.
A nominal 262144-token benchmark prompt was rejected before generation because chat-template overhead made the request 262176 tokens, exceeding the 262144-token slot.
The 260024-token request completed without truncation, proving practical near-256K context fit with Q8_0 and TurboQuant KV.
